name: rabto-ixta
description: Instagram data extraction tool — lookup user IDs and explore similar accounts. Run locally in one command.

scripts.setup:
node -e "console.log('Checking Node.js...'); if (parseInt(process.version.slice(1)) < 22) { console.error('Node.js 22 is required.'); process.exit(1); }" && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "console.log('
Setup complete.
Run:
npm start')"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Building frontend...')" && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('frontend/dist/index.html')){console.error('Build failed.'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Starting development servers. (Frontend + Backend concurrent)...')" && npm run dev --prefix backend & npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && node ./scripts/smoke-test.js

author: Priyanshu Awasthi
